nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘Behold, I am going to save My people from the land of the east and from the land of the west;

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts: Behold, I will save my people from the east country and from the west country,

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘看哪！我必從日出之地和日落之地拯救我的子民。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说，‘看啊，我要从东方和西方救出我的子民，
